cover.era_chip: 近代 文物 · 電燈 · 鐵道
cover.subtitle:
한성에 켜진 빛,
인천까지 달린 첫 기차.
cover.imagePrompt: Late-19th-century Korean illustration. ONE 19th-century steam locomotive of the Gyeongin Line emerging from a tunnel of misty trees, billowing dark gray smoke, on a single track running across a low embankment. Beside the track: ONE Korean man in white dopo robe and small black gat, holding a small folded newspaper, watching the train with quiet astonishment. In the far distance: a row of utility poles with a single line of electric wire heading toward a tile-roofed government building (한성전기회사 reference). Color: dark blue-gray + sepia + amber lamp accent. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 광혜원 설립. 알렌 요청, 곧 제중원 개칭.
육영공원 개교. 최초의 관립 근대 학교.

items.name: 알렌
items.desc: 광혜원 설립 요청, 갑신정변 부상자 치료.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 시설 설립 연도와 기능, 신문 5종(한성순보·독립신문·황성신문·제국신문·대한매일신보)의 발행 주체와 특징, 경인선과 경부·경의선의 부설 목적 구분이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized small electric bulb silhouette next to a tiny folded newspaper. RIGHT: a small steam locomotive silhouette in profile. Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent + faint sepia line. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
